semantic.role: CLI command adapter orchestrating the synchronization workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Parses CLI arguments to determine sync mode flags (e.g., --force, --dry-run, --repair) and validates argument combinations.
Coordinates the sync workflow by delegating to Scanner, Manifest, RuntimeService, and language discovery modules via runSyncWorkflow.
Enforces spine gate protection by invoking detectProtectedOutputMutations before proceeding with sync.
Evaluates and applies repair policies via evaluateRepairPolicy when protected outputs are mutated or corrupted.
Formats sync LLM resolution output for user-facing display.
outOfScope: Direct file system scanning or traversal logic (delegated to Scanner engine).
Manifest file reading or writing (delegated to Manifest infra).
Runtime service execution or LLM invocation (delegated to RuntimeService).
Language discovery or diff computation (delegated to lang-discovery).
Protected output mutation detection implementation (delegated to spine-gate).
Repair policy evaluation logic (delegated to repair-policy).
Execution checkpoint storage or retrieval (delegated to ExecutionCheckpointStore).
invariants: Must remain a thin CLI adapter; must not absorb pipeline or persistence logic that belongs in services, core, engines, or infra (per rule cli-entrypoint-separation).
Must validate CLI argument combinations before proceeding with sync workflow.
Must enforce spine gate protection before allowing sync mutations.
Must delegate all domain logic to appropriate service/engine/infra modules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a thin CLI command adapter that orchestrates the sync workflow by delegating to engines, services, and infra modules, keeping the CLI entrypoint clean and testable.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Resolve lint errors and finalize pipeline fixes before v1.0, likely involving argument validation, error handling, or formatting improvements.

English.role: CLI command adapter orchestrating the synchronization workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Parses CLI arguments to determine sync mode flags (e.g., --force, --dry-run, --repair) and validates argument combinations.
Coordinates the sync workflow by delegating to Scanner, Manifest, RuntimeService, and language discovery modules via runSyncWorkflow.
Enforces spine gate protection by invoking detectProtectedOutputMutations before proceeding with sync.
Evaluates and applies repair policies via evaluateRepairPolicy when protected outputs are mutated or corrupted.
Formats sync LLM resolution output for user-facing display.
outOfScope: Direct file system scanning or traversal logic (delegated to Scanner engine).
Manifest file reading or writing (delegated to Manifest infra).
Runtime service execution or LLM invocation (delegated to RuntimeService).
Language discovery or diff computation (delegated to lang-discovery).

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 镜像系统的 CLI 命令适配器，负责编排同步工作流。
responsibilities: 解析 CLI 参数以确定同步模式标志（如 --force、--dry-run、--repair），并验证参数组合的有效性。
通过委托 Scanner、Manifest、RuntimeService 和语言发现模块来协调同步工作流。
在继续同步之前，调用 detectProtectedOutputMutations 强制执行脊柱门保护。
当受保护输出发生变异或损坏时，通过 evaluateRepairPolicy 评估并应用修复策略。
格式化同步 LLM 解析输出以供用户界面显示。
outOfScope: 直接的文件系统扫描或遍历逻辑（委托给 Scanner 引擎）。
Manifest 文件的读取或写入（委托给 Manifest 基础设施）。
运行时服务执行或 LLM 调用（委托给 RuntimeService）。
语言发现或差异计算（委托给 lang-discovery）。
受保护输出变异检测的实现（委托给 spine-gate）。
修复策略评估逻辑（委托给 repair-policy）。
执行检查点的存储或检索（委托给 ExecutionCheckpointStore）。
